---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Suggest a clarification, example, citation, or beginner-friendly explanation
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Page or Section

Link or name the relevant page, README step, or docs section.

## Suggested Improvement

Describe the change.

## Why It Helps

Explain how this would make the protocol easier to follow, more accurate, or more review-ready.

## Sources or Examples

Add papers, official documentation, tool links, or example commands if relevant.

## Scope

- [ ] Small wording clarification
- [ ] New example command
- [ ] New workflow section
- [ ] Citation or tool update
- [ ] Correction to existing guidance
